title: pfaffia rufa
intro: Pfaffia rufa, also known as Suma, is a perennial plant native to South America, belonging to the Amarantaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Pfaffia rufa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Pfaffia rufa can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or powder, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures.
